name: Iso11783OPChangeChildLocation
title: Iso11783OPChangeChildLocation
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeChildLocation( dword ecuHandle, dword parentID, dword objectID, long dx, long dy );
description: The function moves an object. The object is moved relative inside the parent object. A Change Child Location command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
